scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix NeuraBot" "npm run dev --prefix DashBoard"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix NeuraBot && npm run build --prefix DashBoard
scripts.predeploy: npm run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp -r NeuraBot/dist/. dist/ && mkdir dist/dashboard && cp -r DashBoard/dist/. dist/dashboard/ && echo neurabot.com.br > dist/CNAME
